name: workflow-button
title: Workflow Button
author: Lloyd Humphreys
description: A dependency-free split button that drives an entity through workflow stages: the primary button advances one step (re-labelling itself per stage), and an attached caret menu lists every stage so you can jump anywhere the flow allows. Reachability is a predicate, so a one-way (DAG) flow that forbids going back is one line. Ships a framework-agnostic vanilla core plus a React wrapper.
